strengths: 15+ years full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Current role involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, matching AI agent requirement
Strong testing/TDD background with workshops, Selenium courses, and custom test runner
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in resume
Limited evidence of Kotlin; Java exposure appears dated (robotic arms era)
Cloud experience shown for AWS only; no GCP/Azure or Kubernetes depth detailed beyond GISCollective
response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack engineer well above the 6+ year bar, with directly relevant TypeScript/Node/React work, testing discipline, and current hands-on AI-agent/MCP development that aligns tightly with the internal automation tooling focus. Gaps exist around the specific Nest.js framework and recent Kotlin/Java service work, but the breadth of languages and architecture experience suggests these are learnable; overall fit for a mid-senior IC role is strong.
